// src/repositories/StudyMethodRepository.js
import StudyMethodDAO from'../dao/StudyMethodDAO';const StudyMethodRepository={async getAll(){return await StudyMethodDAO.findAll();},async getById(id){return await StudyMethodDAO.findById(id);},async create(data){return await StudyMethodDAO.create(data);},async update(id,data){return await StudyMethodDAO.update(id,data);},async remove(id){return await StudyMethodDAO.delete(id);},async getByCategory(category){return await StudyMethodDAO.findByCategory(category);},async search(term){return await StudyMethodDAO.search(term);}};export default StudyMethodRepository;
